PowerShell($fs = [System.IO.File]::OpenRead\("C:\\_superposition\\AudHDities-Resonance\\resonance-compass\\release\\resonance-compass-v2.0.0.apk"\); $br = New-Object System.IO.BinaryReader\($fs\); foreach \($lho in @\(962321, 10453032\)\) { $fs.Seek\($lho, 'Begin'\) | Out-Null; $sig = $br.ReadUInt32\(\); $fs.Seek\(22, 'Current'\) | Out-Null; $nlen = $br.ReadUInt16\(\); $elen = $br.ReadUInt16\(\); $name = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($br.ReadBytes\($nlen\)\); $dataOff = $lho + 30 + $nlen + $elen; "name=$name dataOffset=$dataOff mod4096=$\($dataOff % 4096\) mod16384=$\($dataOff % 16384\)" }; $br.Dispose\(\))

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\("C:\\_superposition\\AudHDities-Resonance\\resonance-compass\\src-tauri\\gen\\android\\app\\build\\outputs\\apk\\universal\\release\\app-universal-release-unsigned.apk"\); $entry = $zip.GetEntry\("AndroidManifest.xml"\); $ms = New-Object System.IO.MemoryStream; $entry.Open\(\).CopyTo\($ms\); $bytes = $ms.ToArray\(\); $utf16 = [System.Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetString\($bytes\); foreach \($perm in @\("READ_MEDIA_AUDIO","READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE","INTERNET"\)\) { $found = $utf16.Contains\($perm\) -or [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes\).Contains\($perm\); "$perm : $found" }; $zip.Dispose\(\); Get-Item "src-tauri\\gen\\android\\app\\build\\outputs\\apk\\universal\\release\\app-universal-release-unsigned.apk" | Select-Object Length, LastWriteTime)
